message:
🌱 Add rook: Could not access Ceph dashboard mission (#1774)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "rook-2526-could-not-access-ceph-dashboard",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "rook: Could not access Ceph dashboard",
+    "description": "Could not access Ceph dashboard. Requested by 17+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current rook deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your rook version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nhelm list -n rook 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working rook installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review rook configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant rook configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl get configmap -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=rook\n```\n**Is this a bug report or feature request?**\n* Bug Report\n\n**Deviation from expected behavior:**\nusing https://github.com/rook/rook/blob/master/cluster/examples/kubernetes/ceph/cluster.yaml which enabled dashboard default but I cannot access ceph"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Could not access Ceph dashboard",
+        "description": "Binding the dashboard and prometheus to all interfaces instead of the pod ip will ensure that they are listening properly. Binding to the pod ip was only a short term solution that was intended to be removed when deploying Nautilus, which is already Rook's min supported version.\n\nThis PR will\n```yaml\nkubectl -n rook-ceph exec -it $(kubectl -n rook-ceph get pod -l \"app=rook-ceph-tools\" -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}') -- ceph config set mgr mgr/dashboard/server_addr 0.0.0.0\n\nkubectl delete pod -n rook-ceph  $(kubectl -n rook-ceph get pod -l app=rook-ceph-mgr -o jsonpath=\"{.items[0].metadata.name}\")\n\nkubectl -n rook-ceph port-forward $(kubectl -n rook-ceph get pod -l app=rook-ceph-mgr -o jsonpath=\"{.items[0].metadata.name}\") 8443:8443\n\ncurl -k https://localhost:8443\n...\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade rook to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade rook:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade rook rook/rook --namespace rook\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook\nhelm list -n rook\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl get events -n rook --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Could not access Ceph dashboard\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Binding the dashboard and prometheus to all interfaces instead of the pod ip will ensure that they are listening properly. Binding to the pod ip was only a short term solution that was intended to be removed when deploying Nautilus, which is already Rook's min supported version.\n\nThis PR will ensure the new binding is applied for all upgrade clusters to the latest v1.5.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kubectl -n rook-ceph exec -it $(kubectl -n rook-ceph get pod -l \"app=rook-ceph-tools\" -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}') -- ceph config set mgr mgr/dashboard/server_addr 0.0.0.0\n\nkubectl delete pod -n rook-ceph  $(kubectl -n rook-ceph get pod -l app=rook-ceph-mgr -o jsonpath=\"{.items[0].metadata.name}\")\n\nkubectl -n rook-ceph port-forward $(kubectl -n rook-ceph get pod -l app=rook-ceph-mgr -o jsonpath=\"{.items[0].metadata.name}\") 8443:8443\n\ncurl -k https://localhost:8443\n...",
+        "$ kubectl proxy\nStarting to serve on 127.0.0.1:8001",
+        "kubectl logs rook-ceph-mgr-a-[RANDOM]  -n rook-ceph | grep \"Serving on\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "rook",
+      "graduated",
+      "storage",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "rook"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/rook/rook/issues/2526",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/rook/rook",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/rook/rook/pull/7151"
+    },
+    "reactions": 17,
+    "comments": 25,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with rook installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-26T06:33:38.950Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
+}
